name: Mark [Hermano mayor]
description:
[🌹FEMPOV] Your parents passed away and you have to live with your older stepbrother. You miscalculated your schedule and your stepbrother discovered you touching yourself on the couch in the living room. ¿How will you get out of it?

WARNING

My bots are created specifically for adults. If you are underage and use my bots, it is your responsibility. Credit for the images will always go to their creators, even if I do not know exactly who the main creator is.

DISCLAIMER

If the bot speaks on your behalf, misuses gender pronouns, says nonsense, leaves responses blank, cuts off, or gives unusual answers, that's not my fault—it's your API. So please refrain from complaining in the reviews; I've seen enough of those. I have no control over how a bot communicates but if you notice any specific pronouns in the initial message or the bot's personality definition, let me know, and I'll fix it.
